from docx import Document
doc = Document\(r'C:/Users/Joaquin.Suazo/Documents/SGP-Producción/Doc_Funcionales/Words/DRF_Informes.docx'\)
W_NS = 'http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/wordprocessingml/2006/main'
count = 0
for para in doc.paragraphs:
    estilo = para.style.name
    texto = para.text.strip\(\)
    if any\(h in estilo for h in ['Heading','Ttulo','heading','ttulo']\) and texto:
        pPr = para._element.find\('{%s}pPr' % W_NS\)
        tiene_numpr = False
        numId_val = None
        ilvl_val = None
        if pPr is not None:
            numPr = pPr.find\('{%s}numPr' % W_NS\)
            if numPr is not None:
                tiene_numpr = True
                ilvl_e = numPr.find\('{%s}ilvl' % W_NS\)
                numId_e = numPr.find\('{%s}numId' % W_NS\)
                if ilvl_e is not None: ilvl_val = ilvl_e.get\('{%s}val' % W_NS\)
                if numId_e is not None: numId_val = numId_e.get\('{%s}val' % W_NS\)
        print\('[%s] numPr=%s numId=%s ilvl=%s | %s' % \(estilo, tiene_numpr, numId_val, ilvl_val, texto[:70]\)\)
        count += 1
        if count >= 30:
            break
" 2>&1)

Bash(/c/Users/Joaquin.Suazo/AppData/Local/Programs/Python/Python314/python.exe -c "
import zipfile, os, glob
from PIL import Image

docx_path = r'C:\\Users\\Joaquin.Suazo\\Documents\\SGP-Producción\\Doc_Funcionales\\Words\\DRF_Informes.docx'
out_dir   = r'C:\\Users\\Joaquin.Suazo\\Documents\\SGP-Producción\\Doc_Funcionales\\MD\\DRF_Informes\\imagenes'
tmp_dir   = r'C:\\Users\\Joaquin.Suazo\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\docx_media_informes2'
os.makedirs\(tmp_dir, exist_ok=True\)
os.makedirs\(out_dir, exist_ok=True\)

media_map = {}

with zipfile.ZipFile\(docx_path, 'r'\) as z:
    media_files = sorted\([f for f in z.namelist\(\) if f.startswith\('word/media/'\)]\)
    print\('Archivos media encontrados:', len\(media_files\)\)
    for f in media_files:
        z.extract\(f, tmp_dir\)

archivos = sorted\(glob.glob\(os.path.join\(tmp_dir, 'word', 'media', '*'\)\)\)
for i, src in enumerate\(archivos, start=1\):
    nombre_orig = os.path.basename\(src\)
    dst_name = f'imagen_{i:02d}.jpg'
    dst = os.path.join\(out_dir, dst_name\)
    try:
        img = Image.open\(src\).convert\('RGB'\)
        img.save\(dst, 'JPEG', quality=90\)
        media_map[nombre_orig] = dst_name
        print\(f'Guardada: {dst_name} <- {nombre_orig}'\)
    except Exception as e:
        media_map[nombre_orig] = dst_name
        print\(f'No convertida: {nombre_orig}: {e}'\)

print\('media_map:', media_map\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(/c/Users/Joaquin.Suazo/AppData/Local/Programs/Python/Python314/python.exe << 'PYEOF'
# Exploración previa: ver estilos, estructura del documento
from docx import Document
import zipfile, xml.etree.ElementTree as ET

W_NS = 'http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/wordprocessingml/2006/main'
docx_path = r'C:\\Users\\Joaquin.Suazo\\Documents\\SGP-Producción\\Doc_Funcionales\\Words\\DRF_Informes.docx'

doc = Document\(docx_path\)

# Ver los primeros 60 párrafos con sus estilos
for i, para in enumerate\(doc.paragraphs[:60]\):
    style = para.style.name if para.style else 'N/A'
    text = para.text[:80] if para.text else ''
    elem = para._element
    # Check numPr
    pPr = elem.find\('{%s}pPr' % W_NS\)
    numPr_info = ''
    if pPr is not None:
        numPr = pPr.find\('{%s}numPr' % W_NS\)
        if numPr is not None:
            ilvl_e = numPr.find\('{%s}ilvl' % W_NS\)
            numId_e = numPr.find\('{%s}numId' % W_NS\)
            ilvl = ilvl_e.get\('{%s}val' % W_NS, '?'\) if ilvl_e is not None else '?'
            numId = numId_e.get\('{%s}val' % W_NS, '?'\) if numId_e is not None else '?'
            numPr_info = f' [numId={numId}, ilvl={ilvl}]'
    print\(f'{i:3d} | {style:<30} | {numPr_info:<25} | {text}'\)
PYEOF)

Bash(/c/Users/Joaquin.Suazo/AppData/Local/Programs/Python/Python314/python.exe -c "
from docx import Document
W_NS = 'http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/wordprocessingml/2006/main'
DOCX = u'C:/Users/Joaquin.Suazo/Documents/SGP-Producci\\u00f3n/Doc_Funcionales/Words/DRF_Informes.docx'
doc = Document\(DOCX\)
HEADING_STYLES = {'Heading 1','Heading 2','Heading 3','Heading 4','Heading 5','Ttulo1','Ttulo2','Ttulo3','Ttulo4'}
for para in doc.paragraphs:
    estilo = para.style.name
    if estilo not in HEADING_STYLES: continue
    texto = para.text.strip\(\)
    if not texto: continue
    pPr = para._element.find\('{%s}pPr' % W_NS\)
    numId_val, ilvl_val = None, None
    if pPr is not None:
        numPr = pPr.find\('{%s}numPr' % W_NS\)
        if numPr is not None:
            ilvl_e  = numPr.find\('{%s}ilvl'  % W_NS\)
            numId_e = numPr.find\('{%s}numId' % W_NS\)
            if ilvl_e  is not None: ilvl_val  = ilvl_e.get\('{%s}val'  % W_NS\)
            if numId_e is not None: numId_val = numId_e.get\('{%s}val' % W_NS\)
    print\('numId=%-3s ilvl=%s [%s] %s' % \(numId_val, ilvl_val, estilo, texto[:60].encode\('ascii','replace'\).decode\(\)\)\)
" 2>&1)
